name: Build iOS Apps
description: Build, refine, and debug iOS apps with App Intents, SwiftUI, and Xcode workflows
longDescription: Use Build iOS Apps to design App Intents and App Shortcuts, build or refactor SwiftUI UI, render SwiftUI previews in the OpenClaw in-app browser, adopt modern iOS patterns such as Liquid Glass, audit runtime performance, capture ETTrace profiles, investigate memory leaks, and debug apps on simulators with XcodeBuildMCP-backed workflows.
